headline: Book rides with AI — compare, coordinate, and reuse your routes automatically

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.

summary: An indexable use‑case page showing how Super helps people book rides with AI by operating real apps, comparing ETAs, coordinating pickups, and reusing preferences through a computer-use cache. Built as a standalone SEO answer under /use-cases/ with practical workflows, examples, FAQs, and sibling links.
